meaning: n.(=jewelry) [鎬荤О]鐝犲疂,闀跺祵鏈夊疂鐭充箣楗扮墿
examples: All her jewellery was in pawn.
She has some lovely pieces of jewellery.
Her jewellery sparkled in the candlelight.
But she also hopes to sell smaller versions of the machine to the jewellery trade.
She gave Mrs Kohler a jewellery box made by her nephew David Viscount Linley.
